news.title: Roelof Botha joins SpaceX’s board of directors
news.summary: The former Sequoia Capital leader is filling an "existing vacancy" on SpaceX's board, days after the company went public in the largest IPO ever.

news.summary: Snap's long-awaited smart glasses debut hasn't exactly done wonders for the company's stock.

news.title: Tim Cook says RAM expenses are ‘unsustainable’ and Apple is going to raise prices
news.summary: Apple is planning to raise prices in response to the ongoing memory shortage. news.title: VSCO launches Studio Pro mobile photo editing app and plans $500 per year subscription
news.summary: VSCO is taking on Adobe with a new Studio Pro editing app rolling out today on iOS and coming to macOS later this year, as Bloomberg reports. news.title: Anthropic got hit by export rules nobody understands

news.title: Two-thirds of Americans think AI is advancing too quickly
news.summary: According to the latest Pew Research poll, 49 percent of Americans report using chatbots at least occasionally, but 63 percent think the tech is advancing too quickly. news.title: Second carcass-eating fly species cleared by FDA for maggot wound therapy
news.summary: Maggot therapy lacks robust data, but it has fans and a fail-safe "bacon therapy."

news.title: California says AT&T lied to FCC in attempt to shut off old phone network
news.summary: FCC considers AT&T petitions to preempt state rules and discontinue phone service.

news.title: Massive breach spills credentials for thousands of sensitive networks
news.summary: The affected include Oracle, Lenovo, FedEx, a NATO contractor, and Fortinet.

news.title: Tesco moving 40,000 server workloads off VMware amid Broadcom's “abusive conduct”
news.summary: Tesco claimed Broadcom hiked its VMware prices by about 175 percent in UK court filings.

news.title: The Korean Telecom Giant at the Center of Anthropic’s Mythos Controversy
news.summary: Days before Anthropic took its most advanced AI models offline, the White House ordered the company to revoke SK Telecom’s access to Claude Mythos over claims of alleged ties to China.

news.title: Operating a Humanoid With Your Body Is a Hot Job in China’s Hardware Capital
news.summary: In Shenzhen, workers at IO-AI Tech control humanoid robots using a VR rig reminiscent of Ready Player One.

news.title: No, I Don’t Want to Watch Your Straight Hockey Show
news.summary: From Amazon’s Off Campus to Netflix’s upcoming Icebreakers, the recent spate of hetero hockey romances shows Hollywood learned the wrong lessons from Heated Rivalry.

news.title: The White House Wants Anthropic to Block All Jailbreaks. That May Not Be Possible
news.summary: Trump administration officials tell WIRED that if Anthropic wants to rerelease Fable 5, it will need to ensure the model's guardrails can't be circumvented. Security experts say that can't be done.

news.title: The Gemini-Powered Google Home Speaker Is Finally Here
news.summary: Arriving six years after Google’s last smart speaker, the new HomePod-style device was redesigned to play host to Gemini’s chatbot.
